results.rendered_html:
rikta p. p. [ric-kta]
1 Emptied, cleared, evacuated.
2 Empty, void; devoid or deprived of, without.
3 Hollowed (as hands).
4 Indigent.
5 Divided, separated.
6 Worthless, useless.
7 Unloaded; see ric.
— ktaṃ
1 An empty space, vacuum.
2 A forest, desert, wilderness.
Comp.
— arkaḥ a Sunday falling on one of the riktā days.
— pāṇi, -hasta a. empty-handed, bringing no present (of flowers &c.), ahamapi devīṃ prekṣitumariktapāṇirbhavāmi  M. 4.
